responsibilities: Design and develop electrical schematics, single-line diagrams, and panel layouts for power distribution systems using AutoCAD Electrical.
Perform electrical load calculations, short-circuit analysis, and protective device coordination studies to ensure system safety and code compliance.
Architect power distribution systems including transformers, switchgear, and circuit breakers for industrial and commercial facility installations.
Conduct simulations in MATLAB Simulink and ETAP to validate power flow, voltage stability, and fault current scenarios.
Collaborate with mechanical and civil engineering teams to integrate electrical systems into broader facility and infrastructure designs.
Review and approve vendor electrical drawings, equipment specifications, and bill of materials for procurement and installation.
Ensure all electrical designs comply with NEC, IEEE, and IEC standards as well as local regulatory requirements.
Lead field commissioning, testing, and troubleshooting of electrical systems including motors, generators, and control panels.
Develop technical documentation, design calculations, and engineering reports to support project approvals and client deliverables.
Optimize energy efficiency and power quality through harmonic analysis, power factor correction, and load balancing strategies.
